sentences.arabic: مُمَارَسَةُ الرِّيَاضَةِ عَادَةٌ صِحِّيَّةٌ تَمْنَحُنَا الطَّاقَةَ.
sentences.translation: Vježbanje je zdrava navika koja nam daje energiju.
sentences.translationEn: Exercising is a healthy habit that gives us energy.

sentences.arabic: أَمْشِي لِمُدَّةِ نِصْفِ سَاعَةٍ فِي الْحَدِيقَةِ كُلَّ صَبَاحٍ.
sentences.translation: Svako jutro šetam pola sata u parku.
sentences.translationEn: I walk for half an hour in the park every morning.

sentences.arabic: الرِّيَاضَةُ تُقَوِّي الْقَلْبَ وَالْعَضَلَاتِ وَتُقَلِّلُ التَّوَتُّرَ.
sentences.translation: Sport jača srce i mišiće i smanjuje stres.
sentences.translationEn: Sports strengthen the heart and muscles and reduce stress.
